# PrimaSTEM

> Screen-free coding and mathematics for children ages 4–10. Wooden programmable robot with tangible NFC command tokens.

PrimaSTEM is a wooden educational robot made in Cannes, France. Children place NFC command tokens on a control board to build programs, no screen, no app required. It is a screen-free coding robot where the same coding goes further than the usual ones: not just moving the robot and a few set turns, but any distance, any angle, and real arithmetic, so the programming runs straight into real math. One device covers the whole of ages 4 to 10: logic for ages 4 to 7, mathematics for ages 7 to 10. The robot draws geometric figures (stars, spirals, polygons), making math visible. CE & UKCA certified.

- Full documentation: https://docs.primastem.com (10 languages)
- YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/@primastem

## Contact

- Email: info@primastem.com
- WhatsApp: +33 6 24 95 09 36
- Location: Cannes, France

## Pricing

- Distributors: sold wholesale. Start with a small first order, no big commitment; volume unlocks a better wholesale price and territory exclusivity. You set your own retail for your market. Contact us for terms.
- Schools & families: not sold direct, available through our distributors - contact us and we'll point you to one

## Key Facts

- Material: Wood (robot, board), cardboard (tokens)
- Age range: 4–10
- Certification: CE & UKCA
- Made in: Cannes, France
- No screen, no app, no subscription
- Open NFC platform - tokens writable with free phone app
- Compatible with any grid map (step size adjustable: 10, 12, 15, 25 cm)
- Voice feedback in 17 languages - board speaks each command
- Documentation in 10 languages
